name: ruflo-agentdb
description: Substrate plugin for Ruflo memory: AgentDB controller bridge (15 agentdb_* MCP tools), RuVector ONNX embeddings (10 embeddings_* tools incl. RaBitQ 32x quantization), and WASM HNSW pattern router (3 ruvllm_hnsw_* tools)

interface.shortDescription: AgentDB memory bridge with HNSW vector search, RaBitQ quantization, and semantic routing
interface.longDescription: Substrate plugin for Ruflo memory: AgentDB controller bridge (15 agentdb_* MCP tools), RuVector ONNX embeddings (10 embeddings_* tools incl. RaBitQ 32x quantization), and WASM HNSW pattern router (3 ruvllm_hnsw_* tools)
defaultPrompt: Use ruflo-agentdb to manage memory and vector search for this Codex task
